title: Kalsubai Harishchandragad Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Kalsubai Harishchandragad Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Maharashtra

overview.short: Kalsubai Harishchandragad Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in the northern Western Ghats of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Kalsubai Harishchandragad Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area located in the northern Western Ghats of Maharashtra, India. Spanning approximately 361.71 km2, it is situated primarily within the Akole Tehsil of the Ahmednagar district. The sanctuary houses Mount Kalsubai, the highest peak in Maharashtra (1,646 m), and the historic hill fort of Harishchandragad. The rugged terrain of the sanctuary features moist deciduous and semi-evergreen forests.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Ghanchakkar
topPlaces.description: Ghanchakkar 1,532 metres (5,026 ft) is the third highest peak in the Maharashtra State under Sahyadri mountain ranges in western India. Its neighbouring peak Muda 1,520 metres (4,990 ft) is the fourth highest peak in the Maharashtra State under Sahyadris.

topPlaces.name: Harishchandragad
topPlaces.description: Harishchandragad is a hill fort in the Ahilyanagar district of India. Its history is linked with that of Malshej Ghat, Kothale village and it has played a role in guarding and controlling the surrounding region.

topPlaces.name: Ratanwadi
topPlaces.description: Ratanwadi is a village in Ahmednagar district, Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Amruteshwar Temple
topPlaces.description: Amruteshwar Temple is an intricately carved Shiva temple in Ratanwadi. It is over 1200 years old and was built by the rulers of Shilahara dynasty in the 9th century CE. This is one of twelve Shiva temples built by King Jhanjha.

topPlaces.name: Bhandardara
topPlaces.description: Bhandardara is a holiday resort village on the Pravara River near Igatpuri, in the Western Ghats of India. The village is located in the Akole tehsil, Aahilyanagar district of the state of Maharashtra, about 185 kilometers (115 mi) from Mumbai, and 73 kilometers (45 mi) from Nashik.

topPlaces.name: Ratangad
topPlaces.description: Ratangad is a fort in Ratanwadi, Maharashtra, India, overlooking Bhandardara in the Ahmadnagar district of Maharashtra bordering the Thane district. The fort is about 400 years old.

items.note: Ghanchakkar 1,532 metres (5,026 ft) is the third highest peak in the Maharashtra State under Sahyadri mountain ranges in western India. Its neighbouring peak Muda 1,520 metres (4,990 ft) is the fourth highest peak in the Maharashtra State under Sahyadris.

Harishchandragad is a hill fort in the Ahilyanagar district of India. Its history is linked with that of Malshej Ghat, Kothale village and it has played a role in guarding and controlling the surrounding region.
Ratanwadi is a village in Ahmednagar district, Maharashtra, India.

Amruteshwar Temple is an intricately carved Shiva temple in Ratanwadi. It is over 1200 years old and was built by the rulers of Shilahara dynasty in the 9th century CE. This is one of twelve Shiva temples built by King Jhanjha.

Bhandardara is a holiday resort village on the Pravara River near Igatpuri, in the Western Ghats of India. The village is located in the Akole tehsil, Aahilyanagar district of the state of Maharashtra, about 185 kilometers (115 mi) from Mumbai, and 73 kilometers (45 mi) from Nashik.
Ratangad is a fort in Ratanwadi, Maharashtra, India, overlooking Bhandardara in the Ahmadnagar district of Maharashtra bordering the Thane district. The fort is about 400 years old.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kalsubai Harishchandragad Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kalsubai Harishchandragad Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kalsubai Harishchandragad Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (56 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kalsubai Harishchandragad Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kalsubai Harishchandragad Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kalsubai Harishchandragad Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kalsubai Harishchandragad Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kalsubai Harishchandragad Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ghanchakkar, Harishchandragad, Ratanwadi, Amruteshwar Temple, Bhandardara.
